portfolioOwner.name: YUZ
portfolioOwner.title: Video Editor & Storyteller
portfolioOwner.bio: Award-winning video editor specializing in commercials, documentaries, and music videos. Crafting visual stories that captivate audiences worldwide.

processSteps.title: Discovery
processSteps.description: Understanding your vision, audience, and the story you want to tell.

processSteps.title: Assembly
processSteps.description: Structuring the narrative with a rough cut. Finding the rhythm and emotional beats.

processSteps.title: Refinement
processSteps.description: Precision editing — every cut, transition, and timing perfected.

processSteps.title: Color & Sound
processSteps.description: Professional color grading and audio mixing for a cinematic experience.

processSteps.title: Delivery
processSteps.description: Final export optimized for every platform, from cinema to mobile.
